intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The visual data indicates a severe discrepancy between the registry and the physical reality. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent or non-viable. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but shows signs of extreme senescence or total loss of foliage.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No viable plant matter detected.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is not visible or has completely withered.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected.

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; soil surface appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no signs of mint growth.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; surrounding soil is devoid of Pothos foliage.
plant_audit.P4: Empty black pot; no signs of Silver Guest growth.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all containers.
biome_observations.debris: White rabbit anchor is the only non-soil object present.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t3: Initial state shows minimal biological activity; potential sprout in P3.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Introduction of a spoon in the yellow pot area; potential intervention.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_current: Progressive loss of all identifiable plant structures; total biome collapse.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There is no evidence of photosynthetic activity or living plant tissue in any of the pots. The environment is effectively sterile.
anomalies: Introduction of a metal spoon in T-2.
Complete absence of expected flora across all registered pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical collection. Starting from the earliest image, the plants were already in a state of extreme decline or dormancy. Over the 5-day sequence, any remaining structural integrity vanished. The presence of the white rabbit anchor in P3 confirms the location, but the Pothos is entirely absent. The intervention with the spoon in T-2 did not result in any visible recovery. The biome is currently devoid of life.
